# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes

Resources:
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe01f # Replace with a valid AMI ID
      KeyName: my-key-pair # Replace with your key pair name
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
            VolumeType: gp2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyEC2Instance

  EBSVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance.AvailabilityZone
      Size: 50
      VolumeType: gp2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyApplicationDataVolume

  VolumeAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance
      VolumeId: !Ref EBSVolume
      Device: /dev/sdf

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

  EBSVolumeId:
    Description: The ID of the EBS volume
    Value: !Ref EBSVolume
